created_by.name: Songyos Sugmakanan
created_by.original_name: ทรงยศ สุขมากอนันต์

last_episode_to_air.name: Hormones
last_episode_to_air.overview: All of Oil's lies come crashing down around her. With nowhere else to turn, she writes a heart-wrenching, confessional post on Facebook.

name: Hormones
original_name: ฮอร์โมนส์ วัยว้าวุ่น
overview: High school students in Bangkok wrestle with issues such as sex, teen pregnancy, drugs, school violence, family turmoil and more in this Thai drama.

seasons.name: Season 1
seasons.overview: This series is about Thai secondary school students and their friends trying to find their way through the ups and downs of adolescence. It features issues and experiences of Thai teenagers in high schools, such as relationships, sexuality, sex, bullying, school gang violence and substance abuse. Family issues are also gradually revealed as the series progresses.

seasons.name: Season 2
seasons.overview: Features experiences and problems of Thai teenagers during high school, such as relationships, sexuality, sex, bullying, gang violence, and substance abuse. Family issues are also gradually revealed as the series progresses.

seasons.name: The Final Season
seasons.overview: The seniors have graduated from Nadao Bangkok High School, leaving a legacy for the next generation to build upon… Another school year has arrived, and the “wounds” caused by just living and learning are still very raw. How these teens deal with life’s ups and downs will determine how their wounds turn out in the end. Can they learn from their struggles and become stronger, or will they succumb to their pain and be scarred for life?
